title: Lane 3 high-country vertical memory
summary: Strengthen Treeline/Tundra shelter, exposure, thaw, or descent physical memory without route or station dependencies.

execution_order.goal: Scope one high-country vertical-memory pass around shelter, exposure, thaw, or descent.
execution_order.why_now: Treeline and Tundra have enough proof to support one more carefully chosen spatial beat.

execution_order.goal: Implement the scoped high-country spatial pass with proof.
execution_order.why_now: High-country places should feel physically distinct before more route breadth.

execution_order.goal: Review high-country spatial work and close the lane-3 runway if clean.
execution_order.why_now: The lane should end with local proof and no cross-lane blocker.

completion_gate: One high-country spatial memory improvement lands or is proof-closed.
No route beat, station shell, save change, physics rewrite, or new biome lands.
guardrails: Avoid prompt competition near map posts.

scout_495_handoff.target: Proof-first Treeline Source Shelter high-source/source-memory pocket inside `lichen-fell`, from `rime-brow` into the `source-memory-rime-overlook` and `source-memory-stone-step` read.
scout_495_handoff.finding: Fresh browser proof found no new spatial readability issue. The packet `174` Source Shelter prompt competition remains fixed: source-memory carriers can be read before the Tundra prompt, and at the far prompt edge the nearest inspectable is no longer a source-memory carrier.
habitat_honesty_checks: Keep the target in Treeline `lichen-fell` with high rime/exposed fell carriers: `reindeer-lichen`, `frost-heave-boulder`, `rock-ptarmigan`, `mountain-avens`, `moss-campion`, and `talus-cushion-pocket`.
Do not move or retarget the `HIGH PASS MAP` post.
Avoid Tundra drift/meltwater geometry unless fresh proof shows a real local issue; the prior Tundra relief pass is already clean.
main_495_contract: Re-prove the Treeline high-source/source-memory pocket in a live browser at native `256x160`.
If proof stays clean, land no runtime geometry change and close as proof-only.
If fresh proof finds a real local readability issue, apply only one tiny Treeline-local geometry or existing-carrier placement fix, then rerun focused Treeline/runtime checks and browser proof.
Do not add a route beat, station surface, save change, content-only note, physics pass, traversal framework, cave system, new biome, or map-post change.

summary: Proof-closed the existing Treeline Source Shelter high-source/source-memory pocket without runtime geometry changes.
Fresh browser proof walked from `rime-brow` into the source-memory pocket and out to the separated `TO TUNDRA REACH` prompt edge.
No route beat, station shell, save state, content-only note, physics, map-return post, cave system, traversal framework, new biome, geometry, carrier placement, or player-facing copy changed.
verification: npm test -- --run src/test/treeline-biome.test.ts -t "source memory|Rime Brow|open-fell|shelter and exposure"
npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts -t "Rime Brow|open-fell|map-return post|Source Shelter|Rime Source"
main_495_result.build_note: npm run build was not run because no runtime source files changed.

review_summary: The proof-only result satisfies packet `188`: the Treeline high-source/source-memory pocket reads from `rime-brow` to the separated Tundra prompt edge at native `256x160`.
The source-memory read has no in-range door or travel target before the prompt edge, and the prompt-edge nearest inspectable is not a source-memory carrier.
No route beat, station shell, save state, content-only note, physics, map-return post, cave system, traversal framework, new biome, geometry, carrier placement, or player-facing copy changed.
verification: npm test -- --run src/test/treeline-biome.test.ts -t "source memory|Rime Brow|open-fell|shelter and exposure"
npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts -t "Rime Brow|open-fell|map-return post|Source Shelter|Rime Source"
critic_495_review.residual_risk: The wider worktree contains unrelated dirty source diffs from other lane work, but packet `188` itself was proof-only and did not change runtime source files.

post_packet_path: If clean, lane 3 can later propose an expedition-grade vertical chapter.
If blocked, open a lane-3-local item.
